nasb.text: And I urge you all the more to do this, so that I may be restored to you the sooner.

esv.text: I urge you the more earnestly to do this in order that I may be restored to you the sooner.

cnv.text: 我更加要求你們為我們禱告，好使我們能夠快點回到你們那裡去。

ccb.text: 也请你们特别为我祷告，使我能够早日回到你们那里。

csbs.text: 我特别请求你们祷告，好让我能快一点回到你们那里。
